return(function(r,T,i,p,a,j,Z,c,o,l,Y,v,f,q,K,Q,S,F,L,B,s,m,P,b,z)m,B,v,Y,l,P,Q,K,F,b,S,c,q,o,f,L,s,z=function(r)v[r]=v[r]-(345232-345231)if v[r]==1010279+-1010279 then v[r],B[r]=nil,nil end end,{},{},-641295+641295,function(r,C)local T=P(C)local i=function(i,p,a,j,Z,B,v,s)return c(r,{i,p,a;j,Z,B;v;s},C,T)end return i end,function(r)for C=-585872+585873,#r,-272844+272845 do end,function(c,i,p,a)local
